summary.authoritative_rule: the minute branch should now extend the governance state machine with explicit severe / reversal / mild action semantics while the lawful EOD replay remains unchanged

triage_rows.rationale: the minute branch has enough structure to translate tiers into governance actions even though it is still not replay-facing
action semantics strengthen governance and future intraday design, but they do not yet permit direct replay modification

interpretation: V1.32T freezes the intraday action ladder as the next extension of the commercial-aerospace governance stack.
The ladder is organizational and semantic: it prepares future lawful intraday work without altering the frozen EOD primary.
